## What changed / 改动内容

## Why it helps travelers / 对旅行者的帮助

## Verification / 验证

- [ ] Tested at 320–390 px width / 已测试 320–390 px 屏幕宽度
- [ ] Map drag and pinch zoom work / 地图拖动与双指缩放正常
- [ ] Drawer swipe and handle work / 抽屉滑动与把手正常
- [ ] Route and marker popups render / 路线与标记弹窗正常显示
- [ ] Trip Builder import, save, and Trip Preview work / Trip Builder 导入、保存与 Trip Preview 正常
- [ ] Light and dark themes checked / 已检查浅色与深色主题
- [ ] English and Chinese documentation updated / 已同步更新中英文文档
- [ ] No private trip or booking data included / 未包含私人行程或预订数据
